headline: Ralph Lauren posts 17% revenue rise in Q4 as Asia leads growth
summary: Asia was the standout segment, with revenue climbing 31% on a reported basis and 28% in constant currency to $563.6m.

headline: Why Ralph Lauren (RL) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of fashion brand Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after easing pressure in the bond market and a pullback in oil prices boosted investor sentiment for consumer-facing companies.

headline: Jharonne Martis: The divide in consumer income cohorts is very evident
summary: Jharonne Martis, Director of Consumer Research at LSEG, says higher fuel prices and inflation are pressuring lower income consumers while discount retailers and value focused companies continue gaining traction.
